instruction: State the versions affected by the vulnerability.
input: Umbraco is a free and open source .NET content management system. Starting in version 14.0.0 and prior to versions 14.3.2 and 15.1.2, authenticated users are able to exploit a cross-site scripting vulnerability when viewing certain localized backoffice components. Versions 14.3.2 and 15.1.2 contain a patch.
output: The affected versions are from 14.0.0 up to, but not including, 14.3.2 and from 14.0.0 up to, but not including, 15.1.2.
